rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FIORANI LIVING TRUST DTD. 1/25/02 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioners Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Fixing Amount Of Attorneys Fees And Costs Awarded On Appeal
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner William Parisi's Motion for Attorney Fees and Costs is GRANTED IN PART. No opposition filed. Petitioner is awarded attorney fees of $39,400.00 plus costs of $443.93 for a total of $39,843.93 from Lotchk Corporation and Great Sunset Ventures. The Court finds the attorney fees and costs were reasonably incurred and reasonably necessary. Request for a multiplier is denied. Lotchk Corporation and Great Sunset Ventures, Inc. are jointly and severally liable for the attorney fees and costs. Any party who wishes to contest the tentatve ruling must notify the clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel no later 5:00 p.m. on 5/22/2013. Prevailing party to prepare the order.
